creator: bcr@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've updated the port games/greed to version 3.7, see attached shar-file.
It's my first port (update), so let me know if anything is missing. I've checked it with portlint and it found no errors.

Fix: See attached shar-file.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Compare versions of games/greed with the latest version on its homepage (or use portscout).
